'''Tor Aramatha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]], [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], from the era of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] up until the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Biography==
A contemporary of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]], Aramatha was an influential member of Alderaan's society and government, promoting the Alderaanian ideals of pacifism and coexistence with all. In the years leading up to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he uncovered evidence of an arms smuggling ring on his peaceful [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] and hired a team of freelance investigators to root out the culprit—one [[Lorac Nonnaihr]].<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
